arts.ttl: Van de Ven wary of ‘unbelievable’ Frankfurt threat
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur centre-back Micky van de Ven has called Eintracht Frankfurt forward Hugo Ekitike an ‘unbelievable threat’ but said he hopes to ‘eliminate’ him from tonight’s Europa League clash. Spurs travel to Germany for the second leg of their quarter-final tie tonight, with the score tied at 1-1 on aggregate. arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur XI vs Eintracht Frankfurt – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to Germany to take on Eintracht Frankfurt this evening. The Europa League quarter-final clash is perfectly poised, following a 1-1 draw in North London last week. Spurs dominated that first contest, but were unable to find a winner as the home side spurned several clear-cut chances. arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Bayern are hoping will happen with potential Tottenham transfer deal
arts.sum: Tottenham signed Mathys Tel on loan from Bayern Munich in January, and Christian Falk has provided CaughtOffside with an exclusive update on the French striker’s situation. arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer major injury blow as Ange Postecoglou faces ultimatum
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou confirms a huge injury blow for Tottenham ahead of a career-defining Europa League clash with Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: ‘Priority’ – Tottenham player told club determined to sign him, they want to pay half
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid have been credited with interest in Tottenham Hotspur star Cristian Romero. Recent claims have stated Diego Simeone has held talks with the centre-back and Spurs have set an €80m asking price. Thursday’s edition of AS relays that and then provides their own take. arts.ttl: Four players could miss Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham after huge Son Heung-Min update
arts.sum: Tottenham have been dealt a major blow ahead of their Europa League quarter-final second leg against Eintracht Frankfurt, with Son Heung-Min still unavailable. Despite the significant blow, Kevin Danso is set to return to squad, after missing the last four Premier League games with a thigh issue.
